subject: english
title: Tiếng Anh Nguyễn Tất Thành 2026 (đề khảo sát ĐGNL)
intro: Đề khảo sát ĐGNL vào lớp 6 — môn Tiếng Anh, THCS & THPT Nguyễn Tất Thành 2026. 24 câu kèm đáp án.
source: tak12.com — Đề khảo sát ĐGNL Nguyễn Tất Thành 2026 (kèm đáp án + giải thích)

passages.title: CENTRAL GYM
passages.body:
CENTRAL GYM
15-MINUTE LIMIT on the use of equipment at busy times.

passages.title: School picnic
passages.body:
School picnic
Bring sandwiches, but sorry – no chocolate. I have bottles of water for everyone. Don't forget a jacket – the weather won't be very warm.

passages.title: Panda Bears
passages.body:
One of the most unusual bears known to man is the panda bear. Panda bears live in southwestern China. They live in foggy forests of bamboo. There are two main types of pandas: the giant black-and-white panda and the red panda. They weigh anywhere from 75 to 275 pounds and can grow from five to six feet in height.
Pandas are active both during the day and at night. The most important plant in a panda's life is bamboo. They spend about 12 hours a day eating bamboo. That's a lot of bamboo! Pandas have special bones in their wrists that enable them to hold bamboo stalks. They peel away the outer layer and eat the soft inner part. Pandas also eat bamboo leaves. In addition, they sometimes eat mushrooms, insects, grasses, fish, fruit, and rice.

passages.title: A Visit to Grandma's House
passages.body:
I went to my grandma's house for the day last Sunday and after lunch she asked me a strange question. "What kind of job would you like to do, Tony?" she said.
I thought for a minute and then answered, "Well, I'm only seven so I haven't decided yet, Grandma, but I'd like to be a pirate, I think. Pirates have lots of fun in all my story books!"
Grandma laughed, then found me a scarf and put it round my neck. After that, she got an old toy parrot and put it on my shoulder. Next, she painted a beard on my face. Then she drew a map for me, and I had to find the treasure in her garden. It was a chocolate cake! I love going to my grandma's house. She's very clever. She always thinks of good games to play.

questions.stem: David likes spending his spare time _____ volleyball with his friends.
My mother asked me to buy her _____ toothpaste at the supermarket near my house.
I _____ the bed every morning to keep my bedroom tidy.
Now, scientists _____ new energy sources to protect the environment.
When I read an English text and see a new word, I often _____ the meaning in a dictionary.
They worked hard on this project, so the success belongs to _____.
A rabbit has long ears, a small nose and strong back _____ to help it jump.
The children only have _____ days left before the deadline to complete their programme.
My teacher always tries to _____ during class to help her students feel more relaxed and interested.
We had to clean up the _____ after the science experiment.
My close friend is _____. She always has new ideas for our group.

Joe: Why don't we go camping this weekend?
David: _____.

Linda: Would you like to go to the art exhibition with me this afternoon?
Kevin: _____.

options.text: It opens at seven in the morning.
I'd love to, but I have homework to do.

questions.stem: Which statement is TRUE?

options.text: Members can use equipment in the gym all day.
People may use each machine for fifteen minutes at busy times.
The gym allows unlimited use of all equipment at busy times.
People must stop exercising after fifteen minutes at night.

questions.stem: What does the notice say?

options.text: It will be very hot on the day of the picnic.
The picnic may stop if it is rainy.
Students don't need to bring drinks.

options.text: The eating habits of animals in China
Differences between pandas and other animals

questions.stem: Why can pandas hold bamboo easily?
Which statement is NOT TRUE about the pandas?

options.text: They sleep all day like other bears.
They sometimes eat insects and fruit.

questions.stem: The word "enable" in the text is CLOSEST in meaning to _____.

Fill each blank with ONE word from the passage:
"Last Sunday, Tony visited his grandma's house. After lunch, she asked him about his dream job. Tony wanted to be a (20.1) _____. Grandma dressed him up, giving him a (20.2) _____ and an old toy parrot. Then he had to look for the (20.3) _____ in her garden."
(Write the three words in order, e.g. word1, word2, word3)

Complete the second sentence so that it has the same meaning as the first (fill the blank):
"Our class will have a field trip this weekend if it doesn't rain."
=> "Unless _____, our class will have a field trip this weekend."

Complete the second sentence so that it has the same meaning as the first (fill the blank):
"He became a sports star at the age of twelve."
=> "He became a sports star when _____."

The following sentence has ONE word that is wrong. The correct word has the same pronunciation as the wrong one. Write the CORRECT word:
"My little brother looked at the stars and said he new the name of every planet in the sky."

In about 50-70 words, write a paragraph to answer: "Which club do you want to join after school?"
Gợi ý: Which club do you want to join? What do you do in the club? Why do you want to join it? How does the club help you?
questions.modelAnswer: Sample Answer (74 words): "After school, I really want to join the art club. In this club, we usually draw pictures and make beautiful things from paper. I want to join it because I love colors and art. This club helps me to be more creative and relax after a long day of studying. Also, it is a great place to make friends with other students who like art. In short, it is a wonderful club for me." Yêu cầu: khoảng 50-70 từ; trả lời đủ 4 gợi ý; đúng ngữ pháp/chính tả, mạch lạc.
